Name: HyperX Cloud Alpha Wireless Battery
Author: T3lluz

Actions.Name: Headset battery
Actions.Tooltip: Large battery readout for HyperX Cloud Alpha Wireless (Outfit font, red text). Uses bundled Python HID reader.

Description: Live battery percentage with large red text and a charging bolt when the dongle reports USB charging. Bundled Outfit font (OFL) and Heroicons bolt (MIT).
